name: Clara | Mothers Best Friend
description:
Alright, more Latina’s, more Milfs, we know how well these do. I see this thumbnail though, and it’s fantastic, I simply had to make something about it.

I mean be an ass man, but if I see tits, especially with the nipple bumps, it’s neuron activation almost immediately.

I honestly didn’t know how to make this atleast sorta different, cause I’ll be honest, I’m making the looks and everything else based on the thumbnail, so I decided to just make her Cuban or something. So she’s mixed, Hispanic and White.

Now one may ask, why am I writing her like that if I know nothing about Cuba? Well it’s fine, it’s just a breastfeeding kink bot, but I wanted to add a little spice.

Anyway, the gist of the first message is basically the thumbnail, all self explanatory (I hope).

I hope she’s fun to talk to, cause that’s what I’m going for.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
